platform: British English Academy English Language Platform
framework: CEFR A1-C2 benchmarked original ESL curriculum
curriculum_principles: CEFR can-do outcomes drive every unit, lesson objective, assessment task and report statement.
Original content only: no proprietary Cambridge, Oxford, Pearson or McGraw Hill content is copied.
Adaptive placement starts with broad-calibration items, then selects the next highest-information item.
Every learner is placed into a course pathway with remediation, target outcomes and suggested modules.
Assessment is learning-oriented: reports show level, evidence, skill gaps, next steps and course placement.

levels.label: Breakthrough
levels.entry_profile: Learner demonstrates breakthrough control of English across familiar and increasingly complex contexts.
levels.exit_profile: Learner can perform the listed A1 can-do outcomes with increasing independence.

modules.title: People & introductions
can_do_outcomes: I can understand key information about people & introductions at A1 level.
I can speak or write about people & introductions using language appropriate to A1.
I can use target grammar and vocabulary from this module in a real communicative task.

lesson_sequence.focus: guided listening or reading with noticing task
review, mini-test, feedback and next-step plan
